def extract_columns(rows):
    results = []
    for row in rows:
        name = row[0]
        value = row[0]
        category = row[1]
        label = row[1]
        results.append({
            "name": name,
            "value": value,
            "category": category,
            "label": label,
        })
    return results


def compute_averages(data_points):
    averages = []
    for point in data_points:
        total = point[2] + point[3]
        count = point[2] - point[3]
        if count > 0:
            averages.append(total / count)
    return averages
